text:

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Iran Ends Peace Talks; Bluetooth Name Sparks Plane Scare. What You Need to Know - June 1, 2026
Iran appears to be backing out of indirect talks with the United States as tensions escalate; new fears of Ebola spreading as two people in Brazil await test results after recent travel to Central Africa; a massive explosion at a fireworks factory in Malta forced evacuations and damaged nearby buildings; a flight to Europe abruptly turns around after a passenger’s bluetooth device triggers an emergency response; Barry Manilow opens up about his fight with cancer; and singer Dua Lipa ties the knot in a top-secret wedding, marrying the actor who could be the next 'James Bond.'
